creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
Although there are two documentation options (DOCS and DOXYGEN), neither of them installs the full documentation.

This means that menu options for a manual do not work in kicad, eeschema and pcbnew.

These documents come in a separate distfile, kicad-doc-x.y.z.tar.gz.

Given the size of the distribution, perhaps this could be a separate port?
